board_setup: display.begin(SSD1306_SWITCHCAPVCC, 0x3C); display.setTextColor(WHITE, BLACK); pinMode(AIN1, OUTPUT); pinMode(AIN2, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWMA, OUTPUT); pinMode(BIN1, OUTPUT); pinMode(BIN2, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWMB, OUTPUT); pinMode(AIN1b, OUTPUT); pinMode(AIN2b, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWMAb, OUTPUT); pinMode(BIN1b, OUTPUT); pinMode(BIN2b, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWMBb, OUTPUT); pinMode(AIN1c, OUTPUT); pinMode(AIN2c, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWMAc, OUTPUT); pinMode(BIN1c, OUTPUT); pinMode(BIN2c, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWMBc, OUTPUT); pinMode(_BT, INPUT_PULLUP); pinMode(_BZ, OUTPUT);
